first-launch.notes: Fresh install loads completely blank onboarding state as expected.

post-onboarding.notes: Onboarding completed, transitioned to governed runtime. Profile is unsigned in test context, hence trust-invalid.

relaunch-reconnect-on.notes: App preserved user data. Resumed into target profile. Profile lacks hardware cryptographic signature in test context, resulting in trust-invalid.

relaunch-reconnect-off.notes: App preserved reconnect=false policy. Re-attached to target profile (trust-invalid due to signature absence).

relaunch-offline.notes: App preserved offline policy. State remains ready; unsigned fixture profile remains trust-invalid.

upgrade-relaunch.notes: Installed app launched successfully after upgrade overlay. User data and active profile intact.

uninstall.notes: Uninstaller executed silently. Program executable removed. UserData is preserved by default NSIS config.
